exterior.description: Hand wash, wash and wax, tire shine, window clean, door jambs, and blow dry.

interior.description: Interior deep clean. Vacuum, surface wipe down, clean & condition leather/vinyl, interior windows, trim clean.

full_detail.description: Interior & exterior deep clean combined. Hand wash, wax protection, tire shine, windows, door jambs — the complete package.

maintenance.description: Keep your vehicle looking its best year round. Perfect for regular upkeep.

ceramic.description: Long-lasting protection that enhances gloss and repels water, dirt, and grime. Lasts 3-6 months.

about_text_1: K-Premium Mobile Detailing is Kolton Post's passion turned profession. Every job — from a daily driver to a Porsche 911 to a lake boat — gets the same obsessive attention to detail.
about_text_2: Based in the St. Louis area, K-Premium brings the detail shop to you. Small business, big standards — that's the K-Premium way.
